1735530.name: Stargaze Soundtrack
1735530.description:
Stargaze Soundtrack features 25 minutes of music across 21 songs specifically composed for the game and its 7 planets.

Each track was composed to marry gameplay and narrative emotions of each individual planet with the magnitude of the surrounding cosmic expanse. All music was composed and recorded by Thomas Regin.

Thomas Regin is best known for the music in the urban fantasy Blackwell series and Unavowed by Wadjet Eye Games, as well as for his compositions for the Nancy Drew detective games.
